title: Our Clients | Purbachal Apparel Limited
meta_desc: Purbachal Apparel Limited serves leading global retailers including E.Leclerc, LC Waikiki, Mango, New Look, and more from Bangladesh.
hero_desc: We are proud to partner with some of the world's most recognized fashion and retail brands, delivering quality woven garments that meet their exacting standards.
logos_desc: From Europe to Asia, Purbachal Apparel Limited is the preferred manufacturing partner for renowned international brands that demand quality, compliance, and reliability.

director_items.name: Md. Masud Hossain
director_items.quote: Every client relationship at PAL is built on a foundation of mutual respect and shared goals. We do not just manufacture garments; we invest in understanding our clients' markets, their customers, and their brand values. This is what makes our partnerships truly long-term.

director_items.name: Md. Naimul Alam
director_items.quote: The trust our global clients place in us is something we take very seriously. From initial sampling to final delivery, every process at PAL is designed to deliver exactly what our clients need: on time, to specification, and within their compliance requirements.

partnership_desc: Our client partnerships go beyond transactions; we work closely with each buyer to understand their needs and deliver results.
partnership_image_alt: Md. Masud Hossain, Managing Director, meeting with international buyers at Purbachal Apparel Limited
cta_title: Ready to Join Our Client Family?
cta_desc: Whether you are sourcing for the first time or looking to expand your supplier base, we welcome the opportunity to demonstrate the PAL difference.
